title: Take Care
notes:
Made in Canada.

Inside cover incorrectly lists the deluxe edition bonus tracks ("The Motto Feat. Lil Wayne" & "Hate Sleeping Alone"), but neither song is actually on this release. The cat # is listed on the spine and the rear cover. 2LP housed in a gatefold sleeve.

Track 1 contains elements of "Sailin' Da South" as performed by DJ Screw.
Track 2 contains elements of "Anything" as performed by SWV.
Track 5 contains elements of "I'll Take Care Of You."
Track 7 contains elements of "Neck Of The Woods."
Track 7 contains elements of "Duffle Bag Boy."
Track 7 contains elements of "Farmers Pleasure" performed by Jah Cure.
Track 7 contains elements of "Farmer's Pleasure (Loving This)" remix performed by Jah Cure, Trayon Garrett & Troy Azore.
Track 11 contains elements of "Calling On You" performed by Jon B.
Track 12 contains elements of "The Wrong Thing To Do."
Track 12 contains elements of "If U Scared, Say U Scared."
Track 12 contains samples from "If U Scared, Say U Scared" as performed by Playa.
Track 15 contains elements of "Swanging And Banging" as performed by ESG.
Track 16 contains elements of "Back That Azz Up."

B0016280-01, accompanying side identifier, and RE1 are hand-etched into the runouts. Everything else is stamped.
